build_system: Vite 8 with @tailwindcss/vite plugin, no separate tailwind config file
test_framework: No test framework installed - verification via TypeScript compilation and Vite build
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/Porto-Fakhul && npx tsc --noEmit && npx vite build
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify types. 2. Run npx vite build to verify production build.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. No test framework. Validation via TypeScript check + Vite build.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: premiumEase/springEase from Section.tsx, Magnetic component for hover effects, data-cursor attributes, lucide-react icons, theme-aware colors (bg-surface, bg-sand, text-charcoal, text-charcoal-light, text-terracotta, text-sage), font-hud for UI text, font-display for headings.
key_patterns: Framer Motion for animations with premiumEase/springEase. Tailwind v4 with @theme colors defined in index.css. i18n via useLanguage() hook returning t() function. Section component wrapper for viewport-triggered animations. Magnetic wrapper for hover effects. Fixed overlay pattern for ProjectDetail (fixed inset-0 z-50). AnimatePresence in App.tsx wraps the overlay.
directory_structure: src/sections/ - page sections (Hero, About, Projects, ProjectDetail, Contact, NotFound). src/components/ - reusable components. src/contexts/ - LanguageContext, PreferencesContext. src/data/ - projects.ts with project data. src/locales/ - en.json, id.json, zh.json. src/lib/ - utilities. src/assets/ - static assets.
